messages.content:
Now analyzing the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell clinical framework. Based on the document content and applying the BloomCell 4-step analysis logic across Blood Sugar & Iron, Metabolic & Stress markers, Inflammation & Immune markers, and Deficiency & Absorption indicators, I am generating the structured 8-object output.







✅ Document `e6890dd9-fe0d-476f-82a6-d15581f4879d` has been successfully updated in Cosmos DB with the BloomCell lab analysis `highlightData`.

  "expected_outcome": "Cosmos DB document successfully updated with the new highlightData field.",

{

  "result_summary": "Cosmos DB document e6890dd9-fe0d-476f-82a6-d15581f4879d updated successfully with statusCode 200. The highlightData field containing 8 BloomCell analysis objects was saved correctly.",
